name: Form Analytics Flow — Creator can view submissions and responses charts

planSteps.description: Enter the email 'mrmadhukar@gmail.com' in the email field and the password 'Madhukar@2002' in the password field, then log in
Click the first form card or the analytics view action for the first active form
Navigate to the analytics tab or sub-route ending in '/analytics'
The analytics view or completion graphs/charts are rendered on the page
